semantic.role: CLI command adapter for repository artifact strategy management within the ArchSpine system.
responsibilities: Parses and validates the artifact strategy input from CLI arguments.
Coordinates repository strategy checks and application by delegating to the repository admin service.
Provides user-facing console output for strategy operations, including warnings and step-by-step feedback.
Integrates with the system configuration to retrieve persisted and initialization artifact strategies.
outOfScope: Implementing repository strategy logic (handled by repository-admin-service)
Persisting configuration changes (handled by config infra)
Direct file system operations for artifact management
invariants: Must remain a thin command adapter, delegating core logic to services.
Must not contain business logic for repository strategy evaluation or application.
Must provide clear console feedback for CLI users.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Separate CLI command routing from core repository strategy logic, ensuring testability and reuse.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Refinement of artifact strategy parsing and user feedback output (based on git status showing modifications in CLI-related tests and scanner engines).

English.role: CLI command adapter for repository artifact strategy management within the ArchSpine system.

Provides user-facing console output for strategy operations, including warnings and step-by-step feedback.

outOfScope: Implementing repository strategy logic (handled by repository-admin-service)
Persisting configuration changes (handled by config infra)
Direct file system operations for artifact management

exports.name: runRepoStrategySet
exports.signature:
runRepoStrategySet(
  rootDir: string,
  config: Config,
  nextStrategy: ArtifactStrategy,
  printStep: (message: string, options?: { inline?: boolean }) => void,
)
